_note: Maps ERP corridor/zone ids → expressway. All ERP-rates display logic reads expressway names + ordering from this file. Corridors themselves (with gantry lists, time windows and rates) live in erp-rates.json. TODO: re-check LTA DataMall when a new ERP rates notice is published.

AYE.description: Portsdown–Alexandra citybound; Jurong Town Hall / Clementi set

CTE.description: After Braddell / Serangoon / Balestier; AMK; nb before Braddell

PIE.description: Bendemeer; slip to CTE; westbound before Eunos

BKE.description: Between Dairy Farm Road and PIE

MCE.description: Westbound before Central Blvd; eastbound after Maxwell
